'''thayozho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mnemon|mnemon]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-y-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mnemon|mnemon]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| thayozho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thæyezheth|thæyezheth]] || [[word:thæyezhej|thæyezhej]] || [[word:thæyezhesh|thæyezhesh]] || [[word:thæyezhe|thæyezhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thayoyozhoth|thayoyozhoth]] || [[word:thayoyozhoj|thayoyozhoj]] || [[word:thayoyozhosh|thayoyozhosh]] || [[word:thayoyozho|thayoyozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thayozhoth|thayozhoth]] || [[word:thayozhoj|thayozhoj]] || [[word:thayozhosh|thayozhosh]] || [[word:thayozho|thayozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thayofzhoth|thayofzhoth]] || [[word:thayofzhoj|thayofzhoj]] || [[word:thayofzhosh|thayofzhosh]] || [[word:thayofzhof|thayofzhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thayozhotho|thayozhotho]] || [[word:thayozhojo|thayozhojo]] || [[word:thayozhosho|thayozhosho]] || [[word:thayozhoko|thayozhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thayozhoth|thayozhoth]] || [[word:thayozhoj|thayozhoj]] || [[word:thayozhosh|thayozhosh]] || [[word:thayozho|thayozho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thayozhothol|thayozhothol]] || [[word:thayozhojol|thayozhojol]] || [[word:thayozhoshol|thayozhoshol]] || [[word:thayozhokol|thayozhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thayozhothotho|thayozhothotho]] || [[word:thayozhojojo|thayozhojojo]] || [[word:thayozhoshosho|thayozhoshosho]] || [[word:thayozhoko|thayozhoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thayozhothon|thayozhothon]] || [[word:thayozhojon|thayozhojon]] || [[word:thayozhoshon|thayozhoshon]] || [[word:thayozhokon|thayozhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thayozhothoro|thayozhothoro]] || [[word:thayozhojoro|thayozhojoro]] || [[word:thayozhoshoro|thayozhoshoro]] || [[word:thayozhokoro|thayozhokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
